title: Corporate Interest Restriction relief for certain capital expenditure in calculation of taxable earnings
body: "This measure makes a change to the calculation of taxable earnings (tax-EBITDA) in relation to certain capital expenditure.  The calculation of tax-EBITDA will be amended to exclude capital expenditure deducted for specific reliefs for:   waste disposal site preparation and restoration cemeteries and crematoria flood and coastal erosion risk management projects   These changes take effect for periods ending on or after 31 December 2021. "
